files.contents:
# Hello Colors App

This project is an Express + Tailwind app skeleton. This subtask configures Tailwind and PostCSS so you can build a compiled CSS file in public/dist.

Run steps:

1. Install dependencies:

   npm install

2. Build Tailwind CSS once (produces public/dist/styles.css):

   npm run build:css

3. Start the server (serves files from public/):

   npm start

4. For development (auto-restart server + watch Tailwind):

   npm run dev

Notes:
- Tailwind input CSS lives at src/styles.css and contains the @tailwind directives.
- Compiled output is written to public/dist/styles.css.
hello world

notes: Build CSS with `npm run build:css` - this will output public/dist/styles.css.
Development mode uses `npm run dev` which runs nodemon and tailwind --watch.
A minimal UI is available at public/index.html which links to the compiled CSS at /dist/styles.css.
